ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Olie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Atty. Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Ormiston
Plaintiff's Witness: Robert Ormiston was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony, considering of the Exhibits and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Lydia Morgan as follows:

Principal $608,297.00
Costs $ 895.01, for a total of $609,192.01.
Judgment signed in Open Court.
